prompt: In this spot, choose the best action from the cues.
why_v1: Choose the action that matches your track plan and current pressure.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits the cue set, so the line applies pressure only when the read is strong enough to push the edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raising works better because deep cash stacks give you room to apply pressure and build value when the edge is real.
